title: Go Your Own Way
why_this_song: Go Your Own Way by Fleetwood Mac (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You can call it another lonely day"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You can call it another lonely day"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You can call it another lonely day"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Baby, I'd give you my world"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Baby, I'd give you my world"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "another" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "another" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lonely" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lonely" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Go Your Own Way" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Go Your Own Way" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
